# Plan Quality Checklist: PRD M1 — Slot-First Launch & Dry-Run

**Purpose**: Validate that created planning artifacts (`plan.md`, `research.md`, `data-model.md`, `contracts/`, `quickstart.md`) are complete, clear, consistent, and measurable as requirements-writing outputs.
**Created**: 2026-04-10
**Feature**: `/home/kmk/llm-runner/specs/001-prd-mvp-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` workflow as “unit tests for English” and evaluates requirement quality (not implementation behavior).
**Consulted Subagents**: Architect, Documentation, Python QA, Security Reviewer

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all FR-001..FR-011 represented in the created plan artifacts with no requirement family omitted? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001..FR-011, Plan §Summary]
- [x] CHK002 Are canonical contracts documented for each required output domain (FR-003 dry-run, FR-005 actionable errors, FR-007 artifacts)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003, §FR-005, §FR-007, Contracts]
- [x] CHK003 Are runtime safety requirements fully captured across planning artifacts for lock ownership, lock integrity, and artifact persistence failures? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, §FR-009, Data Model §SlotLockState]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Is the runtime-directory fallback order expressed unambiguously, including behavior when neither location is usable? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007, §FR-009, Research §1]
- [x] CHK005 Is redaction scope precisely defined as key-name matching (KEY/TOKEN/SECRET/PASSWORD/AUTH) with an explicit statement that filesystem paths remain visible? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007, Research §6]
- [x] CHK006 Is the risk-acknowledgement scope explicitly bounded to the three M1 risky conditions without open-ended interpretation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008, Quickstart §2-4]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Are FR-003 required dry-run fields identical between `spec.md`, `data-model.md`, and `contracts/dry-run-canonical-contract.md`? [Consistency, Spec §FR-003, Data Model §ResolvedLaunchIntent, Contract FR-003]
- [x] CHK008 Is the FR-005 multi-blocker shape (`errors[]` with required fields) consistent across spec text and actionable-error contract examples? [Consistency, Spec §FR-005, Contract FR-005]
- [x] CHK009 Are CLI/TUI parity expectations consistent across constitution alignment and planning contracts (same semantics, presentation may differ)? [Consistency, Spec §CA-003, Plan §Constitution Check]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK010 Is SC-002 measurable with an explicit denominator definition tied to FR-005 launch-blocking outcomes in launch/dry-run acceptance paths? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §SC-002, Research §8]
- [x] CHK011 Is SC-003 backed by explicit evidence sources and comparison surfaces (dry-run outputs plus artifact fields) rather than subjective interpretation? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §SC-003, Research §7]
- [x] CHK012 Is SC-006 measurable with clearly stated percentile targets and an unambiguous measurement context for single-slot, two-slot, and per-slot validation timing? [Acceptance Criteria, Measurability, Spec §SC-006, Research §9]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK013 Are requirements written for all primary and alternate flows: dual-slot success, degraded one-slot launch, and full-block launch outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 1, §FR-004, §FR-005]
- [x] CHK014 Are exception-flow requirements explicit for non-eligible `vllm`, malformed lockfiles, and runtime-dir/persistence failures? [Coverage, Exception Flow, Spec §FR-011, §FR-009, §FR-007]
- [x] CHK015 Are recovery-path requirements documented for stale-lock auto-clear, including when recovery is prohibited due to indeterminate ownership checks? [Coverage, Recovery, Spec §FR-009]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK016 Are PID-reuse and start-time mismatch conditions explicitly addressed as launch-blocking integrity outcomes? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK017 Are requirements explicit about representing multiple simultaneous blockers in one response rather than dropping lower-priority blockers? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-005]
- [x] CHK018 Are deterministic-output edge conditions defined for repeated identical inputs across dry-run and artifact generation surfaces? [Edge Case, Spec §SC-003, §FR-007]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK019 Are security requirements for owner-only permissions (`0600` files, `0700` directories) specified as mandatory gates, not best-effort guidance? [Non-Functional, Security, Spec §FR-007, §FR-009]
- [x] CHK020 Are performance requirements quantified with concrete p95 thresholds per operation class and scope? [Non-Functional, Performance, Spec §FR-003, §FR-009, §SC-006]
- [x] CHK021 Are observability requirements explicit about minimum artifact content needed for troubleshooting and deterministic comparison? [Non-Functional, Observability, Spec §FR-007, Contract FR-007]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK022 Is the M1 boundary explicit about what is deferred to M0 and M2+ so acceptance scope cannot drift during implementation? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §FR-010, §Assumptions]
- [x] CHK023 Are hardware/workstation assumptions documented in a way that does not create hidden acceptance dependencies on local GPU availability in tests? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Constitution §II]
- [x] CHK024 Is the dependency on external runtime path availability expressed with required failure outcomes rather than implicit environment assumptions? [Dependencies, Assumption, Spec §FR-007, §FR-009]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK025 Is “profile guidance” sufficiently defined (shape, precedence behavior, and conflict resolution) to avoid interpretation drift? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-006, Research §2]
- [x] CHK026 Is `openai_flag_bundle` sufficiently specified to support objective contract validation rather than ad-hoc formatting interpretations? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-003, Research §3, Contract FR-003]
- [x] CHK027 Do any plan artifacts introduce terminology drift between “session-only” and “current launch attempt only” acknowledgment scope? [Conflict, Spec §FR-008, Edge Cases]

- **Final tally**: 17 PASS, 6 PARTIAL, 4 FAIL

- **Top remediation targets**: CHK004, CHK015, CHK025, CHK026
